title: scortechinia malayana
intro: Scortechinia malayana, also known as the Malay scortechinia, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scortechinia malayana are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. Scortechinia malayana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
